channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: If you don’t trust Big Tech with your data, this is the chatbot for you
item.description: Sure, when chatbots aren’t outright hallucinating, they can be helpful tools for gathering information, generating ideas, and completing tasks. But some of the biggest players in the AI chatbot space—including OpenAI, Google, and Meta—aren’t exactly known for strong privacy protections.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Jury finds Elon Musk misled investors during Twitter purchase, absolves him of some fraud claims
item.description: A jury has found Elon Musk liable for defrauding investors by deliberately driving down Twitter’s stock price in the tumultuous months leading up to his 2022 acquisition of the social media company for $44 billion.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Ortutay, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Teens are suing Elon Musk’s xAI over sexually explicit images, seeking class action status
item.description: Three teenagers in Tennessee sued Elon Musk’s xAI this week, claiming the company’s image-generation tools were used to morph real photos of them into explicitly sexual images.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Cloud at 20: Cost, complexity, and control
item.description: When Amazon Web Services launched its Simple Storage Service (S3) in March 2006, it sparked the imagination of IT leaders worldwide. I remember that era well. It was a time when the enterprise was feverishly searching for a way out of restrictive, on-premises silos.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Maryam Banikarim on career chaos, C-suite pressure, and betting on yourself
item.description: Career disruption is accelerating across the economy—and few people have navigated it more boldly than Maryam Banikarim.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: There’s a better way to use the electric grid—and cut power bills
item.description: When electricity demand is set to surge—say, from a new power-hungry data center—the default response from a utility is often to build a new (and expensive) power plant and other infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Adele Peters, Fast Company

item.title: This new documentary turns AI anxiety into something more personal
item.description: Is it even worth having a kid in the AI era? It’s the question at the heart of The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist, a new documentary about the promise, peril, and uncertainty surrounding artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Marty Swant, Fast Company

item.title: Versa extends SASE platform with Inbound SSE and Secure Enterprise Browser
item.description: SASE is headed in a new direction, literally. According to Versa CEO Kelly Ahuja, security service edge (SSE) platforms have historically focused on one direction: outbound traffic from users and devices to the internet.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Edge.js launched to run Node.js for AI
item.description: Wasmer has introduced Edge.js as a JavaScript runtime that leverages WebAssembly and is designed to safely run Node.js workloads for AI and edge computing. Node apps can run inside a WebAssembly sandbox. Accessible from edgejs.org and introduced March 16, Edge.js is intended to enable existing Node.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 6 ways Gemini supercharges Google Sheets
item.description: Google’s AI assistant, Gemini, can assist you in several ways in Google Sheets, from analyzing your data to helping you edit your spreadsheet faster. In Google Sheets, you mostly use these genAI tools through the Gemini sidebar.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: USAT to Distribute Digital Dollars to Thousands During St. Patrick’s Day Celebration in Times Square
item.description: This St. Patrick’s Day, USAT is putting digital currency directly into the pockets of thousands of New Yorkers. USAT, the digital dollar issued by Anchorage Digital Bank, is taking over Times Square as 2 million spectators flood the streets.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: USAT Introduces Digital Dollar Payments to Millions in Times Square St. Patrick’s Day Takeover
item.description: This St. Patrick’s Day, USAT is making the bridge to digital currency as short as a QR code scan. During a high-impact brand activation in the heart of New York City, USAT is taking over Times Square to show 2 million people how simple moving money can be.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft shuffles more of its senior AI leadership
item.description: The senior leadership shuffle at Microsoft continued on Tuesday when company CEO Satya Nadella announced that the company is unifying the commercial and consumer Copilot systems in a new division overseen by Jacob Andreou.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
